narrative_purpose: Change reality layer, reveal the household scale, map fantasy figures to objects, and establish the family's interpretation of the damage.

beats.summary: Warm domestic light and ambience replace the fantasy battle.
A child's hand lifts the damaged guardian.
The guardian's point of view reveals the household scale.
Fantasy companions and locations map to household objects.
The child presents the damaged figure to the elder.
The elder identifies the figure and its physical damage.
The child reframes the damage as evidence of heroism.

required_state: guardian and tiger positions available for object mapping

outgoing.mapping_state: fantasy identities mapped to household objects
unresolved: early black-tiger mapping versus revised natural-tiger mapping

canonical_facts: Warm domestic reality replaces the fantasy layer.
The guardian, tiger, scout, attendants, and frontier map to household objects or toys.
The guardian's damage is recognized and reframed as heroic.

tolerances.implementation: Professional equivalents are accepted when semantic beats and handoffs remain measurable.
unresolved_cases: Whether the six ordered image references belong to the approved reveal.

terminal_artifact: Approved domestic reveal with complete object mapping and damage recognition
